urdu transliteration text:
Ye Dastane Gham Suno Hazrat HussainkiKarta hoon mein bayan Shahadat Hussainki Listen to the narration of sorrows of Imam Hussain I am narrating incident of the martyrdom of Hussain
Narration of Sorrows

english translation text: Jo Fatemake ankhoke tarethe wo Husain – Jo Mustafake raj-dularethe wo Husain  Jo ladle the shere khudake wahi Husain – Jo rah perthe ahle wafake wahi Husain He was the apple of Fatemah’s eye -  Hussain was the beloved of MustafaHussain was the beloved of the Lion of God -  He was the embodiment of loyalty
Jinko Nabi galese lagatethe wo Husain – Kanthope apne jinko bithatethe wo Husain That Hussain whom the Prophet would embrace -  The Hussain whom he would carry on his shoulders

urdu transliteration text: Jinko Farishte Lori sunate the wo Husain – Jibrael jinka Jula julatethe wo HusainThe Hussain for whom the Angels would sing lullabies -  The same Hussain whose cradle was rocked by Jibrael
Chahi Khudase Bakhshishe Ummat Hussaine – Badlemeki Koobul Shahadat Hussainne He desired forgiveness (Shafa’at) for the Ummah -  in return Hussain accepted Martyrdom

english translation text: Aeysi padi namaz ke sajde me sar diya – Hakke Chamanko Khunse Serab kardiya Ye Shane Allah, Allah azmat Huseinki – Karta hoon mein bayan shahadat HusainkiWhat a prayer he prayed giving his head in prostration -  He watered the garden of truth with his bloodThis grandeur Allah,  Allah the greatness of Hussain -   I am narrating the martyrdom of Hussain

urdu transliteration text: Ye Dastane Gham Suno Hazrat HussainkiKarta hoon mein bayan Shahadat Hussainki Listen to the narration of sorrows of Imam Hussain I am narrating incident of the martyrdom of Hussain

Khat likha Kufione Hussain aap aeye – Aap aake laje deene khudaki bachaeyeNikle Hussain gharse bade bankh panke saath – Bate Bhatije Bhanje Bhai Bahenke saathThe Kufans wrote letters to Hussain to come, to save IslamWith great stature Hussain left home with his sons, nephews, brothers and sisters

english translation text: Jab Sahile Furatpe pahoncha ye kafela – To naher par khada mila lashkar YazeedkaWhen the caravan reached the banks of Furat, they found the army of Yazid waiting for them

Ibne Ziyad aur Shimr wahin aye samne – Kahene lage wo dono sitamgar HusainseTaslim kijiye aap khilafat Yazeedki – Chahejo khair kijiye bayyat Yazeedki Ibne Ziyad and Shimr confronted them, said the 2 tyrants to Hussain :Accept the Khilafat of Yazid - if you desire safety  pledge allegiance to Yazid

urdu transliteration text: Bole Hussain mujko shahadat Kubul hai – Lekin Na takte zulmki bayyat kubul haiHussain said I will accept martyrdom, but allegiance to the throne of tyranny is unacceptable

Sharmae maut dekh kar himmat HussainkiKarta hoon mein bayan Shahadat Hussainki Even death felt humiliated upon Hussain’s courage  I am narrating the martyrdom of HussainI am narrating incident of the martyrdom of Hussain
Ye Dastane Gham Suno Hazrat HussainkiKarta hoon mein bayan Shahadat Hussainki Listen to the narration of sorrows of Imam Hussain I am narrating incident of the martyrdom of Hussain

english translation text: Phir zalimone Naherpe pahera lagadiya – Pani na Ahlebete Nabiko zara diyaPaniko tarse sakiye Kausarke laadle - Yun bhukhe pyase tin din tak sabhi raheThe tyrants then seized the river -  to prevent water to the progeny of the ProphetBeloveds of Kauthar were to be deprived of drink -  thus all remained hungry and thirsty for 3 days
Ayse me hamla kardiya fauje Yazidne – Dekhe gayena Hur-se sitam ahle zulmakeThen the army of Yazid began their offensive -  Hur could not bear to see the atrocities of these tyrants

Wo amile Husainse Lashkarko chodkar – Pahele shahid Hur huwe name Husain parAbbsas ke bhi Naherpe Bazu huwe kalam – Rahe Khudame nikla alamdare haq ka dam He joined Hussain by leaving the army of Yazid - he was the first martyr in the name of HussainAbbas’s arms were severed on the banks of Furat - in Allah’s path the flag bearer of truth lost his life

urdu transliteration text: Kasim ke khun se shadi joda bana kafan – Haq per shahid ho gaye shaizade ye HassanQasim’s blood turned the bridal robes in to shroud - martyred on the path of truth was Hassan’s son

Akbar ka sina phat gaya barchi al amaan – Yoon haq pe ham shabihe payamber ne dedi jaanZainab ke laal Auno Muhhamad ne Sar diya – Mamu pe apne aapko kurban kar diyaAli Akbar’s chest was torn by a spear –  on the path of truth was martyred the image of the ProphetZainab’s beloved Aun & Muhammad gave away their lives -they sacrificed themselves for their uncle
Ek teer khaake Asgare masum chalbase – uff bazu e Husaine mazlum chalbaseAsghar also passed away taking an arrow on his neck – oh, the strength of helpless Hussain passed away
Yoon Karbala me Loot gayee daulat HussainkiKarta hoon mein bayan Shahadat Hussainki Thus, Hussain was deprived of his familyI am narrating the martyrdom of Hussain
Ye Dastane Gham Suno Hazrat HussainkiKarta hoon mein bayan Shahadat Hussainki Listen to the narration of sorrows of Imam Hussain I am narrating incident of the martyrdom of Hussain

Jab janesar sarehi haq per huwe fida – Koyee bachana Abide bimar ke siwaBikharepe lash harshu huwa waqt asrka – Mehve namaz asr huwe ebne MurtazaWhen all the companions of Hussain were sacrificed on path of truth – none was alive except Imam Sajjad asTheir corpses scattered at the time of Asr – when Imam Hussain was engrossed in his afternoon prayers
Sajdeme sarjo Hazrate Shabbirka juka – Ayseme ware Shimrane Shabbir par kiyaAs Imam was bowed in prostration – Shimr attacked Shabbir

Haider ke lal bhukhe pyase huwe shahid – Sajdeme Mustafake nawase huwe shahidPhir zalimo ne Jism se sarko juda kiya – Nezepe sar chada diya Hazrat HussainkaHaider’s son was martyred hungry & thirsty – Mustafa’s grandson was martyred in prostrationThen the enemies beheaded and raised Imam Husains head on a spear
Abid ke haath paonme zanzir daldi – Zainab ke sarse Shimrane chaderbhi chinliThey shackled the hands & feet of Abid – Shimr snatched the veil (chaadar) from Zainab’s head

Yoon Karbalame ahlebaitpe aysa sitam huwa – tadpe zamin aur aasma dariya ro padaDilse na jayega ghame Shabbir hashrataq – Har dil karega matame Shabbir hashr taqSuch were the atrocities inflicted Prophet’s progeny – the earth trembled and the skies weptTill Qayamat, sorrows of Shabbir shall never leave our heart – till Qayamat, every heart will do the Maatam of Shabbir
Zinda rakhega haq ko ye jazba Hussainka – Aayega yaad akhri sajda HussainkaHussain’s passion will keep alive the truth – Hussain’s last prostration will always be remembered
Yaad aayegi payam ibaadat Hussaiki Karta hoon mein bayan Shahadat Hussainki Payaam (the poet), Hussain’s Ibaadat will always be rememberedI am narrating incident of the martyrdom of Hussain
Ye Dastane Gham Suno Hazrat HussainkiKarta hoon mein bayan Shahadat Hussainki Listen to the narration of sorrows of Imam Hussain I am narrating incident of the martyrdom of Hussain
